description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Blue printed kurta has a round neck, dark blue yoke with pin tucks and white stitch detailing, three-quarter sleeves with dark blue tape detailing along the cuffs and a vented hem with white stitch detailing
